# `Sqrt`

**Systems:** X16,C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET,  NES, OK64, BBCM, ACORN, ATARI800  
**Parameters:** `ib`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>Sqrt ( [ number ] );</h3>
<p>
    Returns the square root of the number, be it byte or integer.
</p>




</div>
